ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-04-2012 Continued To Sep-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-12-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Scott Bassin for Gilbert Illescas.

Mr. Bassin stated that Ms. Bell never sent the original will, that his Client beleives that she is not interested in this matter because she is managing the Estate without accounting for it and that they do not expect any cooperation from her. In addition, he stated that he did not know if Oregon law was the same as full authority and that he was fine with limited authority. The Court directed Mr. Bassin to indicate to Ms. Bell that the court agrees that the will needs to be probated and that the original will needs to be provided. In addition, the Court stated that it could proceed to probate the will and admit the copy of the will as a lost will. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary with limited authority (signing the order for the same in open court). Bond is set at $10,000.00.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
